params.name: batch_presence_aware
params.description: Batch presence deliveries via subscription. Enabling changes the shape of `presence_change` events. See [batch presence](/docs/presence-and-status#batching).

params.name: presence_sub
params.description: Only deliver presence events when requested by subscription. See [presence subscriptions](/docs/presence-and-status#subscriptions).

items.docs: Starts a Real Time Messaging session.
